property.name: java.library.path
property.value: D:\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\tgs9311\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0zmAlnZ;D:\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.8\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.8\libnvvp;D:\Vulkan\Bin;D:\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;D:\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;C:\Program Files\Wolfram Research\WolframScript\;C:\Program Files\gsudo\Current;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\Nsight Compute 2025.1.0\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\WinSCP\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\sbt\bin;D:\nodejs\;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;D:\pandoc-3.4;D:\mingw\w64devkit\bin;D:\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1.2\bin;;D:\mysys2\mingw64\bin;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Roaming\npm;c:\Users\tgs9311\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-26.325.31654-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.

testcase.name: guest session endpoints support anonymous club applications
registered players can submit and withdraw club applications over the API
club applications endpoint returns submitted applications
tournament whitelist and stage tables endpoints return seeded competition data
record and appeal detail endpoints return persisted workflow objects
appeal workflow endpoints support triage filters and reopen flow
dashboard endpoints enforce RBAC and allow scoped access
advanced stats endpoints expose dedicated boards with dashboard RBAC
advanced stats admin endpoints expose summary and missing-only backfill
admin dictionary rejects unknown reserved runtime namespace keys
dictionary namespace workflow allows approved owners to write metadata keys
dictionary namespace collaborators can write and reminders can be processed over the API
dictionary namespace context club endpoints enforce explicit club scoping over the API
dictionary namespace transfer rejects suspended owners over the API
dictionary namespace backlog endpoints expose overdue triage data
dictionary key and audit aggregate endpoints return targeted admin data
players and clubs list endpoints support shared pagination and filters
tables records and appeals endpoints support filtering and pagination
dictionary and audit collection endpoints support filters and pagination
dictionary API changes default tournament settlement ratios at runtime
tournament settlement API supports draft revisions finalization and status filters
club management endpoints revoke admin and remove member
tournament admin revoke endpoint removes scoped admin role
club operation endpoints update treasury point pool and rank tree
club member privilege endpoints expose delegated rank capabilities
club title API supports clearing assigned titles
club relation endpoint keeps reciprocal mappings in sync
stage table endpoints expose round filters for multi-round scheduling
dictionary-backed rule templates can configure stage rules over the API
stage rules API can switch swiss pairingMethod to snake
custom stage rules can limit scheduled tables through targetTableCount
stage standings endpoint honors swiss carryOverPoints flag
table seat state endpoint controls readiness and disconnect flow
club honor endpoints award and revoke honors
